description: Local LLM plugin — runs Google Gemma 4 (E2B) ONNX models in-process for on-device text generation (translate, chat, QA, brand-voice) with text, image, and audio input, and speaks a line-delimited JSON protocol on stdin/stdout. A free, private alternative to paid cloud models.
author: Neokapi <hello@neokapi.dev>

commands.name: llm
commands.long: Construct the in-process Gemma 4 engine and list the supported models. The host Gemma AI provider drives the plugin over the stdin/stdout generation protocol (kapi-llm serve); this command is for interactive verification.
